# Murams Living

> Premium PG & Hostel in Rushikonda, Visakhapatnam — 1 km from Rushikonda Beach

Murams Living is a premium paying guest (PG) accommodation and hostel located in Rushikonda, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India (PIN: 530045). The property sits 1 km from Rushikonda Beach and is close to GITAM University, GIMSR Medical College, and Andhra University. It has two buildings: the Gold Building and the Silver Building. Both offer fully furnished AC and Non-AC rooms with home-cooked meals, free WiFi, 24/7 security, and on-site parking.

Murams Living serves three guest types: long-term student residents, short-stay tourists and guests, and working professionals.

## Contact

- Phone (primary): +91 78160 55655
- Phone (alternate): +91 78422 22284
- Email: info@muramsliving.com
- Address: Rushikonda, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh — 530045, India
- WhatsApp: +91 78160 55655

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://muramsliving.com/): Overview of Murams Living — room types, amenities, location highlights, testimonials, nearby attractions
- [For Students](https://muramsliving.com/students): Student PG options — 2-sharing, 3-sharing, 4-sharing AC/Non-AC rooms, pricing, GITAM & Andhra University proximity, long-term stay details
- [For Guests](https://muramsliving.com/guests): Short-stay guest options — flexible check-in/out, beach proximity, nearby tourist attractions
- [Silver Building](https://muramsliving.com/silver): The Silver Building — premium AC/Non-AC rooms, dedicated parking, modern interiors, beach view terrace
- [Amenities](https://muramsliving.com/amenities): Full list of amenities — WiFi, home-cooked meals, 24/7 security, AC, parking, laundry, hot water, housekeeping
- [Gallery](https://muramsliving.com/gallery): Photos — furnished rooms, dining area, beach view terrace, common areas
- [About](https://muramsliving.com/about): Our story, mission, and values
- [Contact](https://muramsliving.com/contact): Directions, phone numbers, WhatsApp, enquiry form
- [Book a Room](https://muramsliving.com/book): Online room booking form for students and guests

## Key Facts

- Distance from Rushikonda Beach: 1 km (approximately 5-minute walk)
- Room sharing options: 2-sharing, 3-sharing, 4-sharing
- Room climate options: AC (air-conditioned) and Non-AC
- Buildings: Gold Building (standard), Silver Building (premium, with dedicated parking)
- Meals: Home-cooked breakfast, lunch, and dinner included daily
- Internet: Free high-speed WiFi throughout the property
- Security: 24/7 on-site security and CCTV surveillance
- Hot water: Available 24/7
- Laundry: On-site laundry service available
- Parking: Available (dedicated in Silver Building)
- Price range: ₹₹ (mid-range, value for money)
- Minimum stay for students: 1 month; maximum: 24 months
- Minimum stay for guests: No minimum (flexible short stays)
- Nearest universities: GITAM University, GIMSR Medical College, Andhra University, AU College of Engineering
- Nearest beach: Rushikonda Beach (1 km)
- Other nearby attractions: Kailasagiri, RK Beach, Araku Valley, Borra Caves, Visakha Museum, INS Kursura Submarine Museum
- Check-in time: 12:00 PM
- Check-out time: 11:00 AM
- Booking method: Online via muramsliving.com/book or by calling +91 78160 55655
- Advance payment: Not required (pay on arrival)
- Documents required (students): Government photo ID (Aadhaar/passport), college ID or admission letter, 2 passport-size photos, emergency contact
- Security deposit (students): One month's rent (refundable)

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is Murams Living?**
A: Murams Living is a premium PG (paying guest) accommodation and hostel in Rushikonda, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh. It offers furnished AC and Non-AC rooms for students, tourists, and working professionals, just 1 km from Rushikonda Beach.

**Q: Where is Murams Living located?**
A: Murams Living is located in Rushikonda, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh — 530045, India. It is 1 km from Rushikonda Beach, near GITAM University and Andhra University.

**Q: What amenities does Murams Living offer?**
A: Amenities include free high-speed WiFi, home-cooked meals (breakfast, lunch, dinner), 24/7 security, AC and Non-AC rooms, hot water, housekeeping, laundry service, a beach view terrace, and parking.

**Q: How do I book a room at Murams Living?**
A: You can book online at https://muramsliving.com/book or call +91 78160 55655. Fill in your details (name, phone, email, preferred building, room type, and dates) and our team will confirm within a few hours. No advance payment is required.

**Q: What are the room options for students?**
A: Students can choose 2-sharing, 3-sharing, or 4-sharing rooms in either AC or Non-AC configuration. Rooms are in both the Gold and Silver Buildings. Long-term stays from 1 to 24 months are available.

**Q: Is Murams Living suitable for female students?**
A: Yes, Murams Living accommodates both male and female students with 24/7 security and a safe, family-friendly environment.

**Q: What is the cost of PG at Murams Living?**
A: Pricing varies by room type (AC/Non-AC), sharing configuration (2/3/4 sharing), and building (Gold/Silver). Contact us at +91 78160 55655 or visit muramsliving.com/book for current pricing.

**Q: Is Rushikonda Beach walkable from Murams Living?**
A: Yes. Rushikonda Beach is 1 km away — approximately a 5-minute walk from the property.

**Q: Which universities are near Murams Living?**
A: GITAM University, GIMSR Medical College, and Andhra University are all nearby, making Murams Living an ideal student PG in the Rushikonda–Visakhapatnam area.

**Q: Does Murams Living require advance payment?**
A: No advance payment is required for guests. Students pay a refundable one-month security deposit plus first month's rent on arrival.
